Swish Dental - Bee Cave

1. Description

Slight Improvement
Current GBP Description:

Swish Dental is transforming the way dental care is done in Bee Cave, with convenient locations throughout Austin, Texas. We offer a full range of services, including general, cosmetic, orthodontic, and family dentistry. Our state-of-the-art studios are designed to provide a relaxing and comfortable experience, ensuring patients of all ages feel at ease. From routine cleanings to advanced treatments like Invisalign, teeth whitening, crowns, and veneers, our expert team is dedicated to providing personalized, high-quality care. Discover a new approach to dental health at Swish Dental. Book online at swishsmiles.com!

Page-Level Checklists

Team Page

Slight Improvement
Minimum 100 words per team member
Internal link to "Meet the Doctor" page
Services mentioned or linked within the text
Staff photos present

Doctor Pages

Missing
Minimum 250–400 words
Credentials listed (DDS, DMD, etc.)
Credentials or affiliations linked

Optimized

Slight Improvement

Key takeaway section present
Author credit present
"Medically reviewed by" or author credit present

Service Pages

Needs Improvement

Need better locational targeting for main dental keywords.

Keyword in headings (H1, H2, H3)
Secondary keywords throughout content
Clear call-to-action (CTA)
Service schema markup present
Optimized meta title and description
Matches commercial intent

Locational Pages

Needs Improvement

Needs more unique content and need sub service pages for locations to go after more keyword + location variations. Links to correct GBP's on each page to be added as well.

Google Map embedded on page
Local images with descriptive alt text

Matches commercial intent
